name: Shodan
description: Shodan is a search engine for Internet-connected devices, providing visibility into exposed services, open ports, vulnerabilities, and banners across the global attack surface.

actions.name: Lookup Host
actions.description: Retrieve all available information on a specific IP address including open ports, running services, banners, hostnames, location, and vulnerability data.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IP address to look up

parameters.name: minify
parameters.description: Return only the list of ports and general host information (default: false)

actions.name: Search Hosts
actions.description: Search Shodan's database of banners using query filters. Returns matching hosts with service details, ports, and metadata.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Shodan search query using filter syntax (e.g., 'apache country:US')

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to get summary information on (e.g., 'country,org')

actions.name: Search Host Count
actions.description: Return the total number of results matching a search query, along with facet information, without consuming search credits.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Shodan search query using filter syntax

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties for summary breakdowns

actions.name: DNS Domain Lookup
actions.description: Get all DNS entries and subdomains discovered for a given domain name.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain name to look up (e.g., 'example.com')

actions.name: DNS Resolve
actions.description: Resolve a list of hostnames to their IP addresses.

parameters.name: hostnames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of hostnames to resolve (e.g., 'google.com,bing.com')

actions.name: DNS Reverse Lookup
actions.description: Look up the hostnames that have been defined for a list of IP addresses.

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of IP addresses to reverse-lookup

actions.name: API Info
actions.description: Return information about the current API key including available credits, plan details, and usage limits.

actions.name: My IP
actions.description: Get your current public-facing IP address as seen by Shodan.
